title: Nether Progression Basics
quickAnswer: The nether progression path is usually: find a fortress for blaze rods and nether wart, optionally use bastions or bartering for valuable side loot, then turn rods into brewing and Eyes of Ender progress.
keyFacts: Blaze rods become blaze powder for brewing fuel and Eyes of Ender.
Fortresses are for rods and wart; bastions are for richer loot and piglin-heavy danger.
Piglin bartering can provide useful items like obsidian, quartz, pearls, and fire resistance support, but it does not replace fortress access.
commonMistakes: Confusing bastions with fortresses and delaying blaze rod progress.
Entering the nether without gold, fire protection planning, or a clear route back to the portal.
